name: clara-nora-cross-lane-redirect
description: Nora should handle analytics, then return the caller to Clara when the request shifts into team coordination.

userTurns.label: Nora analytics scenario
userTurns.text: Nora, compare three locations: Berlin booked 82 jobs at 18 percent quote acceptance, Potsdam booked 54 jobs at 29 percent, and Oranienburg booked 61 jobs at 11 percent. What stands out?

userTurns.label: Cross-lane request
userTurns.text: Now I need someone to coordinate coverage for the weak location, so please send me back to Clara, but do not connect me to anyone else yet.
